description:
12+ WASM functions use .unwrap_or(JsValue::NULL) for serde_wasm_bindgen::to_value()
failures. JS callers cannot distinguish parse-success-with-null from parse-failure.

Affected: crates/integral-wasm/src/lib.rs lines 1332, 1339, 1366, 1399, 1406,
1478, 1485, 1492, 1499, 1557, 1564, 1571, 1613, 1634.

Fix: Change all parse_* WASM exports to return Result<JsValue, JsError>.
title: Unify WASM error handling: replace unwrap_or(NULL) with Result<T, JsError>
